one_row_represents: One election contest for a council year and contest scope
persona_policy_use: Build local democratic timeline; distinguish mayoral contests from ward councillor contests.

one_row_represents: One candidate or group result within one contest
persona_policy_use: Attach electoral competition and representation context to policy briefs without claiming synthetic residents voted.

one_row_represents: One agenda or minutes item considered at a council meeting
persona_policy_use: Connect policy changes, budgets and local service decisions to the meeting where they were made.

one_row_represents: One recorded councillor position on one meeting item
persona_policy_use: Support accountability views where minutes record named votes; leave null when votes are not individually recorded.

one_row_represents: One formal notice of motion sponsored by a councillor
persona_policy_use: Track councillor-initiated policy proposals and community advocacy pathways.

one_row_represents: One planning panel or council planning determination
persona_policy_use: Separate development assessment outcomes from ordinary political votes while retaining local built-environment memory.

one_row_represents: One curated mapping from a civic record to a persona-relevant policy issue
persona_policy_use: Bridge verified political records to persona cohorts for policy-maker and mayor-facing synthesis.
